market_narrative.text: Large-cap indices carried year-end momentum into January, helped by a Federal Reserve pause that markets read as the end of the hiking cycle.

themes.title: Rate pause
themes.text: The Federal Reserve held its policy rate, supporting risk appetite across equity indices.

drivers.text: A reported weekly gain of 3.1% is consistent with the strong momentum signal.
Coverage of the Dow in the bundle is older than the freshness window.

aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.title: S&P 500 posts weekly gain of 3.1%
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.summary: The index rose 3.1% over five sessions.

bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb.title: Federal Reserve holds policy rate
bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb.summary: The committee held the target range unchanged.
